specification:
Type: Interactive simulation **sim-id:** chi-square-distribution
**Library:** p5.js
**Status:** Specified An interactive visualization of the chi-square distribution. A slider controls degrees of freedom (1–10). The user can input observed and expected values for up to 4 categories. The calculated chi-square statistic is shown as a vertical line on the distribution curve, with the area to the right shaded to represent the p-value. Critical values at p = 0.05 and p = 0.01 are marked.
